background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Sudan is facing a humanitarian emergency, and aid access can vary across different states because of conflict and transport problems.
resolution_criteria:
• Source of Truth: Resolve using the NewsFeed report published on March 30, 2026 about an aid disruption affecting civilians in Sudan. If needed, corroborating WFP or UN humanitarian materials may be used only to confirm the spelling of the place name.
  • Resolution Date: This question resolves on March 30, 2026, when the affected Sudanese state is identified in published reporting.
  • Accepted Answer Format: The answer must be the official name of the Sudanese state, in 1-3 words, exactly as named in the reporting.
